data.html:
services:
  app:
    build: .
    container_name: vocesapp_web
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8085:3000"
    volumes:
      # Persist the SQLite database across container rebuilds
      - db-data:/app/prisma
      # Persist uploaded images across container rebuilds
      - uploads-data:/app/public/uploads
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db

volumes:
  db-data:
  uploads-data:
